content.json:
# XFF Compliance Dashboard

Monitors X-Forwarded-For (XFF) header presence, normalization, and diagnostic coverage across **Application Gateway**, **API Management**, and **App Service**.

---

content.query:
AGWAccessLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize RequestCount = count(), AvgLatencyMs = avg(TimeTaken) by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m), ListenerName
| render timechart
content.title: App Gateway – Request Volume by Listener

content.query:
AGWAccessLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize RequestCount = count() by ClientIp
| top 15 by RequestCount desc
content.title: App Gateway – Top Client IPs

content.query:
AGWAccessLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize RequestCount = count() by HttpStatusCode
| render piechart
content.title: App Gateway – Status Code Distribution

content.query:
requests
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| extend xff = tostring(customDimensions["Request-Header-x-forwarded-for"])
| summarize
    TotalRequests = count(),
    WithXFF = countif(isnotempty(xff)),
    WithoutXFF = countif(isempty(xff))
| extend XffPresencePct = round(100.0 * WithXFF / TotalRequests, 2)
| project TotalRequests, WithXFF, WithoutXFF, XffPresencePct
content.title: APIM – XFF Presence Rate

content.query:
requests
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| extend xff = tostring(customDimensions["Request-Header-x-forwarded-for"])
| summarize
    WithXFF = countif(isnotempty(xff)),
    WithoutXFF = countif(isempty(xff))
    by bin(timestamp, 1h)
| render timechart
content.title: APIM – XFF Presence Over Time

content.query:
requests
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| extend xff = tostring(customDimensions["Request-Header-x-forwarded-for"])
| where isnotempty(xff) and xff has ":"
| summarize MalformedCount = count() by bin(timestamp, 1h)
| render barchart
content.title: Non-Normalized XFF (contains :port) – Spikes = Missing Rewrite Rule

content.json: ## 4. App Service – XFF in Application Insights

content.query:
requests
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| extend xff = tostring(customDimensions["X-Forwarded-For"])
| summarize
    TotalRequests = count(),
    WithXFF = countif(isnotempty(xff))
| extend XffPct = round(100.0 * WithXFF / TotalRequests, 2)
| project TotalRequests, WithXFF, XffPct
content.title: App Service – XFF Coverage via App Insights

content.query:
AppServiceHTTPLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize Requests = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m), ScStatus = tostring(ScStatus)
| render timechart
content.title: App Service – HTTP Traffic (native logs)

content.query:
AGWFirewallLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Action == "Blocked"
| summarize BlockCount = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), RuleGroup
| render barchart
content.title: WAF – Blocked Requests by Rule Group

content.json:
## 6. Governance – Resource Graph Compliance

> Run the following in **Azure Resource Graph Explorer** to check rewrite rule coverage:
>
> ```kusto
> resources
> | where type == "microsoft.network/applicationgateways"
> | extend rewriteSets = properties.rewriteRuleSets
> | extend hasRewrite = isnotempty(rewriteSets)
> | project name, resourceGroup, subscriptionId, hasRewrite
> | order by hasRewrite asc
> ```

content.query:
AGWAccessLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize
    FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated),
    LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated),
    RequestCount = count(),
    UniqueHosts = dcount(Host),
    StatusCodes = make_set(HttpStatusCode)
    by ClientIp
| order by RequestCount desc
content.title: App Gateway – All Client IPs (Inventory)

content.query:
requests
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| extend xff = tostring(customDimensions["Request-Header-x-forwarded-for"])
| where isnotempty(xff)
| mv-expand ip = split(xff, ",")
| extend ClientIpAddress = trim(" ", tostring(ip))
| where isnotempty(ClientIpAddress)
| summarize
    FirstSeen = min(timestamp),
    LastSeen = max(timestamp),
    RequestCount = count(),
    UniqueApis = dcount(name),
    SamplePaths = make_set(name, 5)
    by ClientIpAddress
| order by RequestCount desc
content.title: All IPs from XFF Chain (Original Client + Proxies)

content.query:
requests
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| extend xff = tostring(customDimensions["Request-Header-x-forwarded-for"])
| extend OriginalClientIp = trim(" ", tostring(split(xff, ",")[0]))
| extend Endpoint = name
| where isnotempty(OriginalClientIp)
| summarize Calls = count() by OriginalClientIp, Endpoint
| order by Calls desc
content.title: IP → Endpoint Heatmap (Who Calls What)

content.query:
AGWAccessLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize RequestCount = count() by ClientIp, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| render timechart
content.title: IP Activity Timeline

content.query:
AGWAccessLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize
    RequestCount = count(),
    ErrorCount = countif(HttpStatusCode >= 400),
    Unique4xxPaths = dcountif(RequestUri, HttpStatusCode >= 400 and HttpStatusCode < 500),
    ErrorRate = round(100.0 * countif(HttpStatusCode >= 400) / count(), 2)
    by ClientIp
| where RequestCount > 100 or ErrorRate > 50
| order by RequestCount desc
content.title: Suspicious IPs – High Volume or High Error Rate
